title: cyne banahaensis
intro: Cyne banahaensis, also known as the Philippine violet, is a flowering plant native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of the Philippine violet include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cyne banahaensis can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine.
